summary: Spec review approved for GH-110 on head 64a4dcf14c87e4f6bf0493d5355fa0e44420041f. The minimal suite is limited to Core write-side action request guardrail semantics, reuses existing task policy, Run Record, failure, result/evidence query contracts, and explicitly excludes true writes, approval UI, idempotency, post-check/reconciliation, App UI, API submission, SDK/MCP, Harbor/Lode/App changes, and raw evidence retrieval.
